name: events-create
_note: calendar.events-create is a LENS_ACTIONS (PATH 3) handler that appends an event to the caller's per-user STATE.calendarLens.events map (keyed by aidCal(ctx)). FAIL-CLOSED: an empty/whitespace title rejects ('title required'); an unparseable start rejects ('valid start (ISO) required') — no row is persisted on either. A missing end defaults to start+1h, so the persisted event always has finite start AND end. Per-user isolation: events-list/events-delete only see the caller's rows. degrade-graceful: returns ok:false 'STATE unavailable' (never throws) when globalThis._concordSTATE is absent. macro-assassin drives runMacro (which does not resolve LENS_ACTIONS); this contract is the spec for the lens path, and server/tests/calendar-lens-macros.test.js + calendar-domain-parity.test.js are the drivers. No CC, no network.
